executives.name: John Cash
executives.background: Mr. Cash has served as Chairman of the Board since 2022 and as Chief Executive Officer and President since 2022. He previously served as Vice President of Regulatory Affairs, Exploration and Geology from 2011 to 2022. He has more than 30 years of experience in the uranium industry.

executives.name: Roger Smith
executives.background: Mr. Smith has served as Chief Financial Officer since 2007 and as Chief Administrative Officer since 2011. He has over 35 years of experience in finance and accounting, primarily in the mining industry.

executives.name: Steven Hatten
executives.background: Mr. Hatten has served as Chief Operating Officer since 2022. He previously served as Vice President of Operations from 2011 to 2022. He has over 30 years of experience in the uranium industry.

executives.name: Peni Goff-Snyder
executives.background: Ms. Goff-Snyder has served as General Counsel and Corporate Secretary since 2011. She has over 25 years of legal experience, with a focus on corporate and securities law.

board_of_directors.name: John Cash
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Cash has served as Chairman of the Board since 2022 and as Chief Executive Officer and President since 2022. He previously served as Vice President of Regulatory Affairs, Exploration and Geology from 2011 to 2022.

board_of_directors.name: Jeffrey Klenda
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Klenda is a co-founder of the Company and served as Chairman and CEO from 2015 to 2022. He has over 40 years of experience in the financial and mining sectors.

board_of_directors.name: William Boberg
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Boberg is a co-founder of the Company and served as President and CEO from 2006 to 2011. He is a professional geologist with over 50 years of experience.

board_of_directors.name: Thomas Parker
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Parker has over 50 years of experience in the mining industry, including executive roles at High Plains Uranium and Anderson & Schwab.

board_of_directors.name: Gary Huber
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Huber has over 40 years of experience in the natural resources industry and has served on several public company boards.

board_of_directors.name: Kathy Walker
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Walker is the President and CEO of Elm Street Resources Inc. and has over 35 years of experience in the energy industry.

board_of_directors.name: Rob Chang
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Chang is the CEO of Gryphon Digital Mining and has over 25 years of experience in the financial and mining sectors.

sources.source_description: Ur-Energy Inc. Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023
